finding_results.notes: Court work now occurs on Thursday, which is explicitly listed as a court day; Wednesday remains no-impact home mobility only.
Weekly rest day is now consistently Saturday across negotiation, posted schedule, and late-night calendar tension, matching the chapter boundary handoff.
After deletion, the scene now imposes an explicit relational cost: Anika enforces the written consequence and cancels Friday court, with pushback and forced acknowledgment.
Chapter now opens on external institutional pressure at the clinic and moves into terms-setting without repeating a domestic recap scaffold before conflict framing.

Dinner exchange now carries a concrete compliance condition (treat warning signs, explicit timer boundary). Midnight exchange now includes a direct challenge and Ravi disclosure about seeking a loophole, creating leverage shift instead of acknowledgment-only minimalism.

Diversified repeated prose defaults by replacing one "stared at" use and two jaw-motion beats with setting-specific physical actions; remaining "stared at" usage is limited to two intentional instances.
Added explicit Anika interiority in the negotiation run with one sensory beat and one evaluative beat around the definition standoff, eliminating the uninterrupted external-only paragraph stretch.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 12 was restructured to open externally, continuity was reconciled around court/rest day logic, and the deletion aftermath now carries explicit interpersonal consequence before routine transition.
Revised both targeted exchanges to remove consecutive low-information reply pairs and add pressure-relevant leverage shifts while preserving character idiolect and scene continuity.

Chapter 12 prose/copyedit pass resolved both packet findings by reducing repeated construction tics and reinforcing close-third focal depth during the contract negotiation while preserving continuity constraints and scene pressure.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=7, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
